title: ChatCapability.supported_body_types is Vec<String> — BodyType enum exists and is unused here
description: ChatCapability.supported_body_types: Vec<String> where BodyType already exists in types.rs with Plain, Markdown, and Unknown(String) fallback for extensibility. MessageCreateInput.body_type uses BodyType correctly. The capability field should be Vec<BodyType> so callers can intersect supported types with their desired body_type without string comparison. Inconsistency will generate callers doing my_type.to_str() == capability.supported_body_types.iter()...
